pi_items.source: Task description instruction and evaluation script path references.
Verified using pydicom.uid.UID which confirmed this is the correct standard DICOM SOP Class UID for Secondary Capture Image Storage.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to export a DICOM Secondary Capture Image to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/surgical_plan.dcm. The required DICOM SOP Class UID for this format is 1.2.840.10008.5.1.4.1.1.7 (Secondary Capture Image Storage). The medical image used is a real sample dataset from Rubo Medical.
